{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "3227661c7ad98a63",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "# Tutorial 12 - add_equivalent_full_cycles"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "55bbc37fc6a453b4",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "## Step 0: Setup the project and prepare the data"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "initial_id",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-15T10:22:12.427190900Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-15T10:22:11.347752500Z"
    },
    "collapsed": true
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "from pathlib import Path\n",
    "\n",
    "import pydpeet as eet"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "c44394f08aac949e",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "We will use \"ERROR\" as the logging style for better readability of the notebook"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "9edef9d707e9392f",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-15T10:22:12.439663100Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-15T10:22:12.428194700Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "eet.set_logging_style(\"ERROR\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "f07e60bdeabfbc23",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-15T10:22:20.382101700Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-15T10:22:12.440666700Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "standardized_data = eet.read(\n",
    "    input_path=str(Path.cwd().parent.parent / \"res\" / \"raw_data_from_cyclers\" / \"Cal_Ageing_Checkup1.xlsx\"),\n",
    "    config=eet.ReadConfig.Neware_8_0_0_516,\n",
    ")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "4629bb31e26d9f30",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-15T10:22:22.407888900Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-15T10:22:20.382101700Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "segmented_data = eet.add_primitive_segments(df=standardized_data, config=eet.PrimitiveConfig.OCV_ANALYSIS_DEFAULT)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "b25f32535b356360",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-15T10:22:25.209637700Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-15T10:22:22.408401300Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 3840x648 with 3 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "jetTransient": {
      "display_id": null
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "eet.visualize_phases(df=segmented_data, config=eet.VisualizationConfig.DEFAULT)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "3f785d14700fbdf7",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-15T10:22:27.242433700Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-15T10:22:25.212997Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "standardized_data = eet.add_capacity(\n",
    "    df=standardized_data,\n",
    "    df_primitives=segmented_data,\n",
    "    config=eet.BatteryConfig.DEFAULT,\n",
    "    neware_bool=True,\n",
    "    verbose=True,\n",
    ")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "3ce5298b8a8f6a8e",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "## Step 1: add_equivalent_full_cycles"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 11,
   "id": "7670108f21833e18",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-15T10:23:16.310409500Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-15T10:23:15.972009700Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Axes: xlabel='Test_Time[s]'>"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 11,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "jetTransient": {
      "display_id": null
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "df = eet.add_equivalent_full_cycles(\n",
    "    df=standardized_data,\n",
    "    config=eet.BatteryConfig.DEFAULT,\n",
    "    verbose=True,\n",
    ")\n",
    "df.plot(x=\"Test_Time[s]\", y=[\"EquivalentFullCycles\"])"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 8,
   "id": "added_cols_12",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-15T10:22:27.334688400Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-15T10:22:27.278060300Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "['ChargeThroughput[Ah]',\n",
       " 'AbsoluteChargeThroughput[Ah]',\n",
       " 'EquivalentFullCycles']"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 8,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "added_cols = [c for c in df.columns if c not in standardized_data.columns]\n",
    "added_cols"
   ]
  }
 ],
